site.name: Unterhecherhof
site.description: Experience the heart of Tyrol. Our family-run B&B offers an authentic farm stay experience with modern amenities and stunning views.

directions.fromLienz: Take the B100 west towards Sillian. After about 3km, turn right towards Bannberg. Follow the winding mountain road for 4km until you reach the village.
directions.winterDriving: Winter tires are mandatory from November to April. Snow chains are recommended during heavy snowfall.

hero.title: Authentic Alpine Farm Stay in Bannberg, Tyrol
hero.subtitle: Experience the charm of a historic farmhouse nestled in the heart of the Dolomites.

about.title: Family-Run Hospitality
about.description: Escape to Unterhechterhof, a charming alpine B&B in Bannberg, South Austria, where relaxation meets adventure and you will not lack anything. Perfectly situated near the breathtaking Italian Dolomites, our guest house is the ultimate getaway for quick stopovers or extended vacations, offering cozy rooms and fully equipped apartments with optional breakfast served to your door. Adventure awaits just outside your room with top-rated hiking trails, spectacular cycling roads, and thrilling mountain biking routes for all skill levels. At Unterhechterhof, genuine hospitality is our priority; our historic building features thick traditional stone walls that naturally keep summer heat out, allowing you to drift off to sleep in the crisp, fresh mountain air. From vibrant alpine springs where nature bursts into bloom to cozy winter nights, we treat every guest like royalty. Ready for the ultimate Austrian mountain escape? Book your unforgettable stay today by calling +43 664 3434125!

highlights.text: Experience the history and soul of Tyrol

features.title: Why Stay With Us?

items.title: Mountain Views
items.description: Amazing views, skipistes and cycling trails to enjoy nature at it's most majestic all year round.

items.title: Quiet Village
items.description: Find absolute peace in the tranquil and clean atmosphere of Bannberg.

items.title: Farm Breakfast
items.description: Start your day with fresh truly local milk, eggs, and homemade treats.

items.title: Hospitality
items.description: Genuine warmth and personal care from your hosts at a small scale BnB.
